channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Huge sinkhole opens in Shanghai, China
item.description: The hole emerged amid metro excavations in the city.

item.title: WATCH: Advice from seniors for Valentine's Day
item.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to four couples who've been together for a combined 200 years about the secrets to a lasting and loving relationship.

item.title: Measles cases surpass 900 in US with infections in 24 states: CDC
item.description: Measles cases have surpassed 900 in the U.S., according to newly updated data from the CDC.

item.title: ICE says 2 officers may have lied under oath about shooting migrant in Minnesota
item.description: The acting head of ICE says two officers appear to have made "untruthful statements" about shooting a migrant in Minnesota and may face federal charge...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Sheriff speaks to ABC News about DNA, gloves
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: DOJ drops case against 2 men accused of assaulting ICE, citing new evidence
item.description: A judge dismissed charges against two men charged with assaulting ICE officers after the Justice Department said "newly discovered evidence" was "mate...

item.title: Today's CPI report is the best inflation news in months. Here's why.
item.description: The inflation reading, the lowest since May 2025, shows grocery, gas and rent prices are cooling.

item.title: What services would be affected by a DHS government shutdown?
item.description: Funding for the Department of Homeland Security will expire at the end of the day Friday. Here's what will be affected.

item.title: Journalist Don Lemon pleads not guilty to civil rights charges in Minnesota church protest
item.description: Former CNN host Don Lemon has pleaded not guilty to federal civil rights charges in Minnesota, accused in a protest at a church in St.

item.title: ICE agents on leave for lying under oath in Minneapolis shooting investigation
item.description: Todd Lyons, the acting head of Immigration and Customs Enforcement accused two federal agents of lying under oath regarding the mid-January shooting o...

item.title: Minnesotans welcome the immigration surge drawdown but remain vigilant
Generally Recognized As Safe | Sunday on 60 Minutes
item.description: "There is no way for any American to know if a product is safe if it is ultraprocessed," Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. tells 60 Minutes. Sund...

item.title: Feds open a perjury probe into ICE officers’ testimony about the shooting of a Venezuelan man
